arts.ttl: Bayern Munich star Dayot Upamecano weary of PSG’s ruthless attack ahead of blockbuster Champions League clash
arts.sum: Not only is this a fixture between two top teams, but it’s one that has built up historical significance ever since Bayern edged out PSG to claim the Champions League title in 2020. PSG’s attack as a whole has been exemplary this season, as the team has netted 36 goals in 12 league matches ( FotMob ).

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Joshua Kimmich reflects on Germany’s 2024
arts.sum: It’s part of the path we want to take to be successful in big tournaments, like Spain for example, who have won this competition. I personally enjoy playing a lot of games, but I can understand every player that says it’s too much.

arts.ttl: Transfer rumors, news: PSG plot January move for Rashford
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain could target Marcus Rashford as soon as January, according to reports. Transfer Talk has the latest news, gossip and rumors.

arts.ttl: Pundit unsure of Leroy Sané’s future with Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Didi Hamann has watched the careers of Bayern Munich ’s Joshua Kimmich and Leroy Sané very closely, but he is unsure of what the future might hold for one of those stars. “Joshua Kimmich won’t leave Bayern Munich, Vincent Kompany has made him a very important player in the middle of the pitch.

arts.ttl: Injured Bayern Munich star João Palhinha talks pressure and expectations
arts.sum: Bayern Munich midfielder João Palhinha is out for the rest of 2024, but the former Fulham FC star understands the expectations associated with his move to Bavaria. “Bayern wanted to sign me twice, and now it’s up to me to take responsibility for the club, to become a great player for this club.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Max Eberl understands the pressure and expectations of his role
arts.sum: Eberl knows that the former executives will always be there for discussion if he needs it — and also that the club needs to capture a trophy or two this season to ease the pressure on the squad planners. It’s clear that the exchange with the supervisory board is intensive; we don’t need to talk on the phone every day and we don’t need a fixed weekly appointment.

arts.ttl: PSG Chief Breaks Silence on Mbappé Exit Amid Financial Dispute
arts.sum: Kylian Mbappé and Paris Saint-Germain are in the middle of an ugly separation. The Frenchman left the French giants this past summer as a free agent to join Real Madrid, but the chapter between the two parties isn’t over. arts.ttl: What Joachim Löw promised Bayern Munich’s Jamal Musiala in 2021 to get him on the German men’s national team
arts.sum: Bayern Munich and Germany star Jamal Musiala was the subject of a tug-of-war between the England and Germany men’s national teams over three years ago. Now, former Germany coach Joachim Löw has revealed what went down — and how he helped recruit the young sensation into the fold.

Florian Plettenberg from Sky Sports Germany recently mentioned that Nkunku isn’t planning to leave during the winter transfer window.
